title: Broodlord
text:
!!{{!!title}} --- {{!!points}} points

{{||CharacteristicsTable}}

Unit Composition --- 1 {{!!title}}

{{||$:/templates/biomorphs-rules}}

;Psyker
:A Broodlord generates its psychic powers from the ''Biomancy'', {{Broodmind||$:/templates/tooltips}}, {{Powers of the Hive Mind||$:/templates/tooltips}}, and ''Telepathy'' disciplines.
;Options
*May take up to one of each of the following upgrades:
**{{Feeder Tendrils||$:/templates/tooltips}} --- 2 points
**{{Implant Attack||$:/templates/tooltips}} --- 2 points
**{{Scything Talons||$:/templates/tooltips}} --- 3 points
**{{The Ymgarl Factor||$:/templates/tooltips}} --- 4 points
**{{Synapse Creature||$:/templates/tooltips}} (6") and {{Shadow in the Warp||$:/templates/tooltips}} --- 15 points
*May exchange [[rending claws|Rending Claws]] with {{Broodlord's Claws||$:/templates/tooltips}} --- 25 points
*May upgrade Psyker Mastery Level to 2 --- 30 points
*May take items from the {{Biomorphs||$:/templates/tooltips}} list.
creator: Jeanbeaux
description: If a Broodlord possesses the Ymgarl Factor (see below), you may also upgrade a single unit of Genestealers with the Ymgarl Factor. If you choose to do so, the Broodlord must start the game attached to that brood of Genestealers.
special-rules: [[Bulky]] [[Hit & Run]] [[Furious Charge]] [[Fleet]] [[Independent Character]] [[Fearless]] [[Fear]] [[Infiltrate]] [[Move Through Cover]] [[Return to the Shadows]] [[Hyper-reflexes]] [[Psyker (Mastery Level 1)]] [[Stealth]] [[Master of the Brood]] +[sort[title]]
